state_law: RK4 spatial SIR transition mean with additive Gaussian process noise on (S_j,I_j)

reference_routes.dense_reference: small-J tensor-product dense quadrature on the declared closure target
reference_routes.cut4: CUT4 diagnostic on the same additive-Gaussian structural closure
reference_routes.zhao_cui: P46/P47 multistate retained-grid fixed-design TT route

production_prerequisites: reviewed production or near-paper-scale run manifest
observed and unobserved state errors reported separately
nonclaims: CUT4 state moments are diagnostic only in M4a
veto_diagnostics: observed-only accuracy promoted as full-state accuracy
native SIR and Gaussian closure mixed as one target
production token emitted from lower-rung evidence
finite output promoted as production correctness
